Footer.description: Escapamex was born from the desire and need to provide great experiences in every journey.

features.heading: Everyone dreams of traveling; we make it possible.

logistics.title: Smooth logistics
logistics.description: Travel logistics can be overwhelming. We take care of every detail so you can enjoy your trip.

personalized.title: Personalized itineraries
personalized.description: We specialize in creating personalized travel experiences tailored to your specific preferences and interests.

support.title: Travel support
support.description: We offer expert guidance and ensure your peace of mind from planning to the journey itself.

about.title: Where extraordinary experiences begin
about.description: With extensive experience and a dedicated team of travel experts, we are committed to delivering seamless travel experiences, personalized service, and attention to detail. We take the time to listen to your wishes and create tailor-made itineraries that reflect your individual style and exceed your expectations.

experiences.title: Experiences
experiences.description: Routes designed to help you enjoy more.

customPlan.title: Do you want a special experience?
customPlan.question: Need more information or want to plan a group adventure?
customPlan.text: If you have questions about our services, want more details about this tour, or are planning a special experience for a group, contact us.

why.title: We design experiences that go far beyond a simple tour.

contact.title: Travel with us
contact.text: Tired of dreaming about the life you want? It is time to act and make those dreams real. Let us help you open the door to your dreams and start living the life you want.

errors.paymentFailed: The payment could not be completed.

paidState.title: Payment completed
paidState.description: Your purchase was processed successfully. We sent the confirmation by email.

hero.badge: We are here to help you
hero.title: Contact Us

form.title: Get in touch
form.name: Name
form.successMessage: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

content.title2: Want to learn more or plan a trip with friends?
content.paragraph1: Do you have questions about our services, want more details about this tour, or are you planning a special experience for your group?
content.paragraph2: We are ready to help. Our team offers personalized support to design an adventure tailored to your interests and needs.
content.paragraph3: Whether you're looking for a cultural immersion, a day exploring cenotes, or a unique mix of activities in Tulum and its surroundings, we will be happy to help you create the perfect experience.

form.experience: What experience are you looking for?
form.details: Describe what you have in mind so we can prepare your quote *

success.title: Request sent
success.description: Our team will contact you to build your experience.

cta.title: Already have a quote?
cta.description: If you already have an ID, you can go to “Pay your quote”. If you're still exploring options, we invite you to visit our store.

hero.title: Pay your quote
hero.description: Enter your quote number and complete the process to secure your experience.
